apa-√dhvaṃs -dhvaṃsati, to scold, revile, [Comm. on]  MBh. i, 5596  (‘to drive or turn away’,  NBD. );
to fall away, be degraded ( NBD. ),  Hariv. 720.

results.rendered_html:
apadhvaṃs 1 A. (rarely P.)
1 To pack off, clear out; apadhvaṃseti bahuśo vadan krodhasamanvitaḥ  Hariv. 
2 To abuse, revile, scold; na cāpyanyamapadhvaṃsetkadācitkopasaṃyutaḥ  Mb. 
— Caus. To free from dust; blow away (as dust &c.).
